mapper.select: SELECT id, session_id, user_id, tenant_id, title, status, created_by, created_at, updated_by, updated_at, deleted FROM cs_session WHERE deleted = FALSE AND session_id = #{sessionId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cs_session ( id, session_id, user_id, tenant_id, title, status, created_by, updated_by, deleted ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{sessionId}, #{userId}, #{tenantId}, #{title}, #{status}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy}, FALSE ) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING
